name: io.github.joepangallo/agent-pay
description: Payment gateway for AI agents. Discover, provision, and pay for tool APIs.

environmentVariables.description: Your AgentPay gateway key (starts with apg_)
environmentVariables.name: AGENTPAY_GATEWAY_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Admin key for reliability endpoints (circuit breakers, health metrics, config)
environmentVariables.name: AGENTPAY_ADMIN_KEY

environmentVariables.description: AgentPay API URL. Defaults to https://pay.leddconsulting.com
environmentVariables.name: AGENTPAY_URL
